name: Teng Family Massacre
description: Wang Lin annihilates the Teng family to avenge his parents. The single most defining karmic act of his early cultivation — locks his Dao toward Slaughter.

consequences.note: dao_affinity locked toward Slaughter; mercy threshold permanently lowered
heavenly resentment accumulated; manifests across later tribulations

prime_directive_note: This karma persists objectively; no amount of merit erases it. It can only be paid in kind.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Teng Family Massacre. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
